name: Hot and Sour Soup for Tian Jin Rice
ingredients: 25 g Fresh Shiitake Mushroom, Finely Sliced
2 tbsp Rice Wine Vinegar Kong Yen
steps: Finely slice the carrot and shiitake. Really fine like toothpicks.
In a pan, put in 2-3 tbsp of sesame oil.
Once the sesame oil is hot, add the carrots and shiitake.
Season with salt and white pepper.
Once the carrot and shiitake are nicely sweated, add the dashi without the ginger, discard ginger.
Season with premium soy, kong yen rice wine vinegar, ching kiang vinegar, mirin. Taste and see if it needs more salt.
Take the pan off the heat source. Stir the hot and sour soup in one hand, and pour in the cornstarch water in the other. Keep stirring.
Bring back to the heat, stir and adjust thickness to a velvety texture.

other_details.notes: Taste profile should be very peppery from the white pepper.
